title: euphorbia pithyusa subsp. cupanii
intro: Euphorbia pithyusa subsp. cupanii, also known as Cupan's spurge, is a subspecies of succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia pithyusa subsp. cupanii include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Euphorbia pithyusa subsp. cupanii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
